mapper.select: SELECT p.*, hs.id as hs_id, hs.code as hs_code, hs.name as hs_name, hs.description as hs_description FROM pet_pet p LEFT JOIN pet_health_status phs ON p.id = phs.pet_id LEFT JOIN health_status hs ON phs.health_status_id = hs.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM pet_pet WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY publish_time DESC
SELECT * FROM pet_pet WHERE type = #{type} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY publish_time DESC
SELECT * FROM pet_pet WHERE (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR breed LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY publish_time DESC
SELECT * FROM pet_pet WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY (view_count * 0.3 + favorite_count * 0.7) DESC, publish_time DESC
